comment: Phase 7.D — pinned CV asset manifest. Every entry MUST carry a HTTPS url, a sha256 of the exact bytes, and an explicit license. weights/ assets are fetched on first use (gitignored cache). samples/ assets are dataset subsets (FLAME / D-Fire / VisDrone) that are research-only and never redistributed in this repo. Real fixtures live in sim/swarm_sim/cv/fixtures/ and ARE committed (CC0 only).

yolov8n.pt.description: YOLOv8n baseline COCO weights. 80 classes (incl. person). CV-live re-pin: Ultralytics re-published the release asset so the prior pin (31e20dde…, 6534387 B) no longer matched the bytes served. Re-verified that the v8.3.0 and v8.4.0 URLs serve byte-identical files with this sha and that the model loads + detects person; pinned the current verified sha.

yolov8n-fire.pt.description: YOLOv8n fine-tuned on FLAME + D-Fire (smoke/fire). Drone-day: pin sha256 + size_bytes after first verified download; until then, fire detection falls back to the COCO baseline + a smoke/fire kind heuristic.

yolov8n-person-aerial.pt.description: YOLOv8n fine-tuned on VisDrone (person/people, aerial). Drone-day: pin sha256 + size_bytes after first verified download; until then, person detection falls back to the COCO baseline `person` class.

flame-fire-001.jpg.license: FLAME dataset — research use only (Roberts et al., 2020). Not redistributed in this repo. Verified pin TBD on first cached download.

visdrone-aerial-001.jpg.license: VisDrone dataset — research use only (Zhu et al., 2018). Not redistributed in this repo. Verified pin TBD on first cached download.
